hero.subtitle: Ghế Đầy answers your customers over SMS in English and Vietnamese, books the slot, takes the deposit, and fills your waitlist — for nail salons, restaurants, barbershops, spas and beyond.

social.quote1: It books appointments while I'm doing nails. No more missed texts.
social.quote2: Party-size questions and deposits are handled before I even look.
social.quote3: Walk-ins fill the chair the moment someone cancels.

showcase.heading: One assistant. Every seat-based business.
showcase.nailHeadline: Books services in Vietnamese and English
showcase.nailBody: Customers text the way they speak. Ghế Đầy understands the service, offers open chairs, and takes a deposit to lock it in.
showcase.restaurantHeadline: Asks party size, then seats the right table
showcase.restaurantBody: “Table for 4 at 7?” is all it takes. Larger parties are sent a deposit link automatically; everyone else gets an instant confirmation.
showcase.barberHeadline: Keeps every chair full all day
showcase.barberBody: Walk-ins join a waitlist over SMS and get offered the next open slot the moment a chair frees up.

features.bilingualBody: Your customers text the way they speak. Ghế Đầy replies in their language and books without a hitch.
features.liveBody: New bookings slide onto your dashboard the instant they happen — no refresh, no app to babysit.
features.depositBody: Send a Stripe payment link over SMS for the bookings that need it, and watch no-shows disappear.
features.waitlistBody: When a slot opens, the next customer in line is offered it automatically over SMS.

how.heading: How it works
how.step1Body: Your customer texts your number like they text a friend.
how.step2Body: Ghế Đầy confirms the slot and collects a deposit when needed.
how.step3Body: Every booking lands on your dashboard in real time.

items.a: Yes. Ghế Đầy replies in the language your customer texts in — English or Vietnamese — automatically.

items.q: What kinds of businesses does it work for?
items.a: Any seat-based service: nail salons, restaurants, barbershops, spas, and more. Behaviour is configured per business, not hardcoded.
Through Stripe. You onboard once with Stripe Connect Express; customers pay via a hosted link sent over SMS.
Bookings are auto-marked and your waitlist is offered the freed slot over SMS.

items.q: Do I need a new phone number?
items.a: We provision a dedicated number per location so your existing line is untouched.

items.q: Can I take over a conversation?
items.a: Anytime. Pause the AI on any conversation and reply manually from the dashboard.
No. Monthly, per location, cancel anytime.

items.q: How fast can I go live?
items.a: Once your offerings and hours are in and Stripe is connected, the first SMS books correctly immediately.

footer.tagline: Your AI receptionist. Books every seat, in every language.
